headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 10, 2026**
article:
The Washington Nationals suffered a 5-2 loss to the Miami Marlins, with Heriberto Hernández leading the Nationals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. Andrew Nardi pitched a strong 0.2 innings in relief, striking out 2 batters without allowing a run.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, with Justin Verlander being transferred to the 60-day injured list due to left hip inflammation. Kerry Carpenter has been placed on the 10-day injured list with a left AC Joint Sprain. The Los Angeles Dodgers have also made several roster moves, including transferring Edwin Díaz to the 60-day injured list with right elbow loose bodies and placing Brock Stewart on the 15-day injured list with a left foot bone spur.

The San Francisco Giants have made a trade, sending catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles have also made a trade, acquiring Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Nationals Fall to Marlins in 5-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dropped a 5-2 decision to the Miami Marlins, with Heriberto Hernández leading the Nationals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. Andrew Nardi pitched a strong 0.2 innings in relief, striking out 2 batters without allowing a run.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Athletics in Thrilling Match**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 2-1 victory over the Athletics, with Chris Bassitt earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Rico Garcia secured the save for the Orioles.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Red Sox 4-1**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 4-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Nick Martinez earning the win. Bryan Baker earned the save in the win.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Phillies in Dominant 6-0 Shutout**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies secured a convincing 6-0 victory over the Colorado Rockies, with Cristopher Sánchez pitching 7.0 innings of shutout baseball, striking out 7 batters and allowing 6 hits. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with 3 hits, including 2 home runs.

top_news.title: **Verlander Shifts to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Justin Verlander has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to left hip inflammation. The Detroit Tigers pitcher will be sidelined for an extended period.

top_news.title: **Giants Make Roster Move Ahead of Monday's Game**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants have made a trade, sending catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.
